_comment: Curated exclusions, committed like synonyms.json. videoIds/artistIds: junk to keep OUT of the corpus regardless of the whitelist. playlistIds: community playlists to remove (your manual backstop). playlistTerms: case-insensitive substrings that, if found in a community playlist's TITLE or CURATOR name, reject it at discovery and remove it on revalidate (you own this list — what's off-policy is your call).
